Reckless Drift Racing

Race against AI opponents on a muddy isometric track! Master drifting by steering into turns at high speed, manage your vehicle's momentum, and cross the finish line first. Navigate through checkpoints while avoiding track boundaries. Win races to earn points and unlock victory!

Arrow Up/W: Accelerate | Arrow Down/S: Brake/Reverse | Arrow Left/A: Steer Left | Arrow Right/D: Steer Right | Space: Boost (limited use) | Enter: Start Game | ESC: Pause/Unpause | R: Restart to Menu

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic racing mechanics including acceleration, steering, and checkpoint progression. Verifies that the vehicle can navigate the track, pass through checkpoints in order, and complete a lap. Ensures physics feel responsive and AI opponents function correctly.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Accelerate continuously using the up arrow, steer through the first few checkpoints, and verify checkpoint counting works. Test turning left and right at moderate speed. Observe AI opponent behavior and ensure they navigate the track independently.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Vehicle should accelerate smoothly, respond to steering inputs, and successfully pass through checkpoints incrementing the counter. AI opponents should navigate the track without getting stuck. Test is successful if the player can complete at least one lap without errors.
